style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. Three rounded boxes in a row, left to right, joined by curved arrows. The first box, drawn with a rust outline to emphasise it, is labelled PRONGHORN with a smaller word « CONCEPTION » beneath. The second box is labelled NEXUS with « CONSTRUCTION » beneath. The third box is labelled VELOCITY with « MESURE » beneath. A small caption under the row reads « TROIS ÉTAPES, UNE SEULE CHAÎNE DE MONTAGE ». Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
